title: Futuristic Advertisement Featuring Athletic Woman Braided Hair
sourceTitle: Futuristic Advertisement Featuring Athletic Woman Braided Hair
prompt: A futuristic advertisement featuring an athletic woman with braided hair in a high-tech laboratory setting. She is holding a sleek, metallic sci-fi shaker bottle with a digital display. The scene is illuminated by neon blue and yellow lighting, surrounded by lab flasks and high-tech gear. The image is filled with bold cyberpunk-style promotional text like "CITRUS ENHANCED BEYOND NATURE," "LEMON-IGNITE BIO-INFUSION," and "EVOLUTION IS PRECISION. NOT LUCK," alongside sci-fi UI icons for neural and cognitive boosts.
originalPrompt: A futuristic advertisement featuring an athletic woman with braided hair in a high-tech laboratory setting. She is holding a sleek, metallic sci-fi shaker bottle with a digital display. The scene is illuminated by neon blue and yellow lighting, surrounded by lab flasks and high-tech gear. The image is filled with bold cyberpunk-style promotional text like "CITRUS ENHANCED BEYOND NATURE," "LEMON-IGNITE BIO-INFUSION," and "EVOLUTION IS PRECISION. NOT LUCK," alongside sci-fi UI icons for neural and cognitive boosts.

promptTranslations.zh: 一则未来感广告，描绘一位运动型女性编发造型，置身于高科技实验室环境。她手持一款流线型金属科幻摇杯，配有数字显示屏。场景笼罩在霓虹蓝和黄色灯光中，周围摆放着实验烧瓶和高科技设备。画面充满大胆赛博朋克风格促销词汇，如“CITRUS ENHANCED BEYOND NATURE”（柑橘超自然强化）、“LEMON-IGNITE BIO-INFUSION”（柠檬点燃生物注入）和“EVOLUTION IS PRECISION. NOT LUCK”（进化靠精准，不靠运气），伴随神经和认知加强科幻UI图标。
promptTranslations.fr: Une publicité futuriste mettant en scène une femme athlétique aux cheveux tressés dans un laboratoire de haute technologie. Elle tient une bouteille shaker métallique et épurée de style science-fiction avec affichage digital. La scène est éclairée par des lumières néon bleues et jaunes, entourée de flacons de laboratoire et d’équipements high-tech. L’image est enrichie de textes promotionnels audacieux de style cyberpunk tels que « CITRUS ENHANCED BEYOND NATURE », « LEMON-IGNITE BIO-INFUSION » et « EVOLUTION IS PRECISION. NOT LUCK », accompagnés d’icônes UI de science-fiction pour des boosts neuronaux et cognitifs.
promptTranslations.ru: Футуристическая реклама с атлетичной женщиной с косами в высокотехнологичной лаборатории. Она держит гладкую металлическую шейкер-бутылку в научно-фантастическом стиле с цифровым дисплеем. Сцена освещена неоновым синим и жёлтым светом, вокруг стоят лабораторные колбы и высокотехнологичное оборудование. Изображение наполнено яркими промотекстами в киберпанк-стиле, такими как «CITRUS ENHANCED BEYOND NATURE», «LEMON-IGNITE BIO-INFUSION» и «EVOLUTION IS PRECISION. NOT LUCK», а также Sci-Fi UI иконками для нейронных и когнитивных усилителей.
promptTranslations.pt: Um anúncio futurista apresentando uma mulher atlética com cabelo trançado em um ambiente de laboratório de alta tecnologia. Ela segura uma garrafa shaker metálica e elegante de ficção científica com display digital. A cena é iluminada por luzes neon azuis e amarelas, cercada por frascos de laboratório e equipamentos tecnológicos avançados. A imagem está repleta de textos promocionais ousados em estilo cyberpunk como "CITRUS ENHANCED BEYOND NATURE," "LEMON-IGNITE BIO-INFUSION," e "EVOLUTION IS PRECISION. NOT LUCK," junto com ícones de interface sci-fi para impulsos neurais e cognitivos.
promptTranslations.ja: 編み込みヘアのアスリート女性をハイテク研究所の環境でフィーチャーした未来的広告。彼女はデジタルディスプレイ付きのスリムで金属的なSFシェイカーボトルを手に持っている。ネオンブルーと黄色のライティングに照らされ、周囲には実験器具やハイテク装置が陳列されている。画像には「CITRUS ENHANCED BEYOND NATURE」「LEMON-IGNITE BIO-INFUSION」「EVOLUTION IS PRECISION. NOT LUCK」といった大胆なサイバーパンク風プロモーションテキストや、ニューラルや認知機能を高めるSF UIアイコンが散りばめられている。
promptTranslations.ko: 운동선수 여성의 땋은 머리가 돋보이는 미래형 광고. 하이테크 실험실에서 촬영된 이 장면에서 그녀는 디지털 디스플레이가 달린 세련된 금속성 SF 셰이커 병을 들고 있다. 장면은 네온 블루와 옐로우 조명으로 밝히며, 실험용 플라스크와 첨단 장비들이 주변을 둘러싸고 있다. 이미지에는 "CITRUS ENHANCED BEYOND NATURE"(시트러스가 자연을 초월해 강화됨), "LEMON-IGNITE BIO-INFUSION"(레몬 이그나이트 바이오 인퓨전), "EVOLUTION IS PRECISION. NOT LUCK"(진화는 정밀함이지 운이 아니다) 등 대담한 사이버펑크 스타일의 홍보 문구와 신경 및 인지 강화용 사이파이 UI 아이콘들이 함께 배치되어 있다.
